languages.text: "Прошу прощения?" {n}Камилла поджимает тонкие губы — в ее взгляде читается легкое отвращение.{/n} "Бедняжка, у вас, должно быть, контузия. Обязательно покажитесь хирургеону".
"I beg your pardon?" {n}Camilla presses her thin lips together, a look of mild revulsion in her gaze.{/n} "You poor thing, you must be in shock. Be sure to see the chirurgeon."
languages.original_text: "Прошу прощения?" {n}Камилла поджимает тонкие губы — в ее взгляде читается легкое отвращение.{/n} "Бедняжка, у вас, должно быть, контузия. Обязательно покажитесь хирургеону".

traits.locale_text: "I beg your pardon?" {n}Camilla presses her thin lips together, a look of mild revulsion in her gaze.{/n} "You poor thing, you must be in shock. Be sure to see the chirurgeon."
"I beg your pardon?" {n}Camilla presses her thin lips together, a look of mild revulsion in her gaze.{/n} "You poor thing, you must be in shock. Be sure to see the chirurgeon."
"I beg your pardon?" {n}Camilla presses her thin lips together, a look of mild revulsion in her gaze.{/n} "You poor thing, you must be in shock. Be sure to see the chirurgeon."

languages.text: “你说什么？”{n}卡米拉抿起薄薄的嘴唇，眼中流露出一丝淡淡的嫌恶。{/n}“可怜的孩子，你一定是吓傻了。记得去找船医瞧瞧。”
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon?" {n}Camilla presses her thin lips together, a look of mild revulsion in her gaze.{/n} "You poor thing, you must be in shock. Be sure to see the chirurgeon."

traits.locale_text: “你说什么？”{n}卡米拉抿起薄薄的嘴唇，眼中流露出一丝淡淡的嫌恶。{/n}“可怜的孩子，你一定是吓傻了。记得去找船医瞧瞧。”

languages.text: « Je vous demande pardon ? » {n}Les lèvres pincées, Camilla vous lance un regard qui dénote un léger dégoût.{/n} « {mf|Mon|Ma} pauvre, vous devez être sous le choc. Veillez à consulter le chirurgeon. »
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon?" {n}Camilla presses her thin lips together, a look of mild revulsion in her gaze.{/n} "You poor thing, you must be in shock. Be sure to see the chirurgeon."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous demande pardon ? » {n}Les lèvres pincées, Camilla vous lance un regard qui dénote un léger dégoût.{/n} « {mf|Mon|Ma} pauvre, vous devez être sous le choc. Veillez à consulter le chirurgeon. »

languages.text: "Nasıl yani?" {n}İnce dudaklarını birbirine bastıran Camilla'nın bakışlarında hafif bir tiksinti beliriyor.{/n} "Vah vah, şok geçiriyor olmalısınız. Mutlaka cerrahı görün."
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon?" {n}Camilla presses her thin lips together, a look of mild revulsion in her gaze.{/n} "You poor thing, you must be in shock. Be sure to see the chirurgeon."

traits.locale_text: "Nasıl yani?" {n}İnce dudaklarını birbirine bastıran Camilla'nın bakışlarında hafif bir tiksinti beliriyor.{/n} "Vah vah, şok geçiriyor olmalısınız. Mutlaka cerrahı görün."

languages.text: «Cómo dice?». {n}Camilla aprieta los labios con una expresión de desagrado en los ojos.{/n} «Ay, pobre, debe de haber sufrido una conmoción. Asegúrese de visitar al cirujano».
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon?" {n}Camilla presses her thin lips together, a look of mild revulsion in her gaze.{/n} "You poor thing, you must be in shock. Be sure to see the chirurgeon."

traits.locale_text: «Cómo dice?». {n}Camilla aprieta los labios con una expresión de desagrado en los ojos.{/n} «Ay, pobre, debe de haber sufrido una conmoción. Asegúrese de visitar al cirujano».

languages.text: "Bitte?" {n}Camilla presst ihre schmalen Lippen aufeinander und wirkt ein wenig angewidert.{/n} "Ihr armes Ding, das muss der Schock sein. Ihr solltet den Chirurgeum aufsuchen."
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon?" {n}Camilla presses her thin lips together, a look of mild revulsion in her gaze.{/n} "You poor thing, you must be in shock. Be sure to see the chirurgeon."

traits.locale_text: "Bitte?" {n}Camilla presst ihre schmalen Lippen aufeinander und wirkt ein wenig angewidert.{/n} "Ihr armes Ding, das muss der Schock sein. Ihr solltet den Chirurgeum aufsuchen."

languages.text: 「お詫び申し上げます」{n}と、薄く唇を閉じたカミラは、わずかな嫌悪感を浮かべている。{/n}「かわいそうに、あなたはショックを受けているのでしょう。必ず外科医に診てもらってください」
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon?" {n}Camilla presses her thin lips together, a look of mild revulsion in her gaze.{/n} "You poor thing, you must be in shock. Be sure to see the chirurgeon."

traits.locale_text: 「お詫び申し上げます」{n}と、薄く唇を閉じたカミラは、わずかな嫌悪感を浮かべている。{/n}「かわいそうに、あなたはショックを受けているのでしょう。必ず外科医に診てもらってください」
